are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
ASK {
  ?brooke wdt:P19 ?brooke_place .
  ?colin wdt:P19 ?colin_place .
  ?brooke_place wdt:P31 wd:Q234 .
  ?colin_place wdt:P31 wd:Q234 .
  ?brooke_place wdt:P625 ?brooke_coords .
  ?colin_place wdt:P625 ?colin_coords .
  FILTER(?brooke_coords = ?colin_coords)
}

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?verb ?lemma WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17278755 .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?verb), "uş"))
  ?verb wdt:P1889 ?lemma .
}

query.sparql:
ASK {
  ?player1 wdt:P106 wd:Q36656;  # basketball player
           wdt:P1411 wd:Q674359;  # award received: All-NBA Team
           wdt:P40 ?year1.
  ?player2 wdt:P106 wd:Q36656;  # basketball player
           wdt:P1411 wd:Q674359;  # award received: All-NBA Team
           wdt:P40 ?year2.
  FILTER(?year1 = ?year2)
  FILTER(?player1 IN (wd:Q25369, wd:Q169452))  # Kobe Bryant and Shaquille O'Neal
}
